variant_name: 高令宁 — 孕期与早产
trigger: 怀孕回娘家养胎，后被沈词推倒导致早产难产，最终生下女儿并递交和离书

appearance_delta.face: 未施粉黛，面色极度苍白虚弱，满是冷汗，但眼神透着死心后的空洞与平静
appearance_delta.body: 腹部隆起（孕晚期），姿态虚弱无力
appearance_delta.hair: 发丝被汗水浸湿，凌乱地贴在脸颊和脖颈处
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 极度虚弱的生理状态与异常坚定冷酷的心理状态形成强烈反差

costume_override.outfit: 宽松柔软的孕期里衣/素色长衫，产房场景中下摆带有血迹

visual_reference: A beautiful pale ancient Chinese woman in late pregnancy, wearing loose plain white inner Hanfu clothes, lying on a bed, hair wet with sweat and messy, extremely weak but with a completely cold and resolute gaze, dramatic dim lighting, cinematic, emotional and painful atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic.
emotional_tone: 身体极度虚弱，心理彻底死心与决绝
